channel.title: Videos on Pushpak Prabhat | Animation & Interactive Technology
channel.description: Recent content in Videos on Pushpak Prabhat | Animation & Interactive Technology

item.title: ET Money Brand Promo
item.description: Just finished this promotional piece for ET Money! The challenge was to make investment features feel exciting and accessible. Used After Effects and Cinema 4D for the 3D elements. 🎬💰

item.title: Data Visualization Motion Graphics
item.description: Created this data visualization animation for a client presentation. Transforming numbers into visual stories is what I love doing most. After Effects + custom expressions = magic ✨📊

item.title: Abstract 3D Loop Animation
item.description: Another satisfying loop! This 3D animation explores organic forms meeting geometric precision. Rendered in Blender Cycles with custom shader nodes. 🧊🎨

item.title: Educational Explainer Animation
item.description: Created this 2D explainer for an ed-tech platform. The character animation was done frame-by-frame to give it that hand-crafted feel. Some things AI can’t replace! ✌️🎞️

item.title: Movie Poster Motion Design
item.description: Motion posters are one of my favorite things to create. Taking a static image and adding subtle parallax, particles, and lighting effects to bring it to life. This one has a cinematic dark mood. 🎬🌙

item.title: Quick Tips: After Effects Expressions
item.description:
Quick tip! 5 After Effects expressions every motion designer should know. Save this for later! 💡⚡

#MotionDesign #AfterEffects #Tutorial

item.title: Logo Reveal 3D Animation
item.description: This 3D logo reveal was a fun project combining Blender and After Effects. The metallic shader work was particularly challenging but rewarding! 🎯
